summary: Phase 6 Telegram Alerts Integration - All tests passed. Backend: 15/15 tests (100%). Frontend: 7/7 UI tests (100%). Fixed minor bug in config update logic for preserving toggle state.

minor.issue: When updating telegram_signals_enabled only, it was resetting telegram_enabled to false due to using .enabled property instead of ._enabled internal value. Fixed by testing agent.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/alerts/test returns 200 with status='skipped' when no credentials
GET /api/alerts/status returns correct structure (configured, enabled, signals_enabled, total_sent, total_failed)
GET /api/config includes telegram section with all required fields
PUT /api/config with telegram_enabled=true updates notifier state
PUT /api/config with telegram_enabled=false reverts notifier state
Toggle one setting preserves the other (after fix)
Notifier reports configured=false when no credentials set
Test alert endpoint skips gracefully without error
frontend_ui_tests: Telegram Alerts section present with data-testid='section-telegram-alerts'
Test Alert button present with data-testid='test-alert-btn' and correctly disabled
Trade Alerts toggle present with data-testid='toggle-telegram-btn'
Signal Alerts toggle present with data-testid='toggle-signals-btn'
Bot Configured shows 'No' badge when no credentials
Toggle buttons functional (ON → OFF on click, shows toast)
regression_tests: All 7 nav items present in sidebar
Trade Ticker visible globally on Settings and Overview pages
P&L Chart section present on Overview page

seed_data_creation: None - testing uses graceful no-credentials mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 Telegram Alerts complete. TelegramNotifier at /app/backend/services/telegram_notifier.py subscribes to EventBus events (ORDER_UPDATE, RISK_ALERT, SYSTEM_EVENT, SIGNAL). Without credentials (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID), notifier gracefully reports configured=false and skips sends. Settings page has Telegram Alerts section with toggle buttons for trade/signal alerts and a test button (disabled when not configured). PUT /api/config accepts telegram_enabled and telegram_signals_enabled boolean fields. Fixed bug where toggling one setting incorrectly reset the other - now uses ._enabled internal value instead of .enabled property. Regression tests pass: health, ticker feed, pnl-history, all 7 nav items, trade ticker strip.
